title: Consecutive Sections - HybISS and MALDI MSI for 72 hpf Embryonic Zebrafish
author: Schede, Halima Hannah
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
These data correspond to the HybISS analysis present in the preprint 'Unified Mass Imaging Maps the Lipidome of Vertebrate Development 
 https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2024.08.20.608739v2 
 Two .h5ad files correspond to the lipid and rna distributions, '  consecutiveSection-lipids.h5ad  ' and '  consecutiveSection-RNA.h5ad  ', respectively. 
 How to view the objects is instructed on the webpage www.zebra-L.epfl.ch under the 'Tutorials' tab.
steps_raw:
These data correspond to the HybISS analysis present in the preprint 'Unified Mass Imaging Maps the Lipidome of Vertebrate Development

 Two .h5ad files correspond to the lipid and rna distributions, '  consecutiveSection-lipids.h5ad  ' and '  consecutiveSection-RNA.h5ad  ', respectively. 
 How to view the objects is instructed on the webpage www.zebra-L.epfl.ch under the 'Tutorials' tab.
